name: cloudfortress-ai
description: Elite Cloud Security Command Center Orchestrator

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend-express"
scripts.dev:full: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend-express" "cd backend && .\venv\Scripts\uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend-express
scripts.install:prod: npm install --production && npm install --prefix backend-express --production && npm install --prefix frontend
